prompt: Generate an epic war poster with the people in the first image and the garden hall from the second image in the background with title: 'Battle of Eram Garden'.
prompt_refined: Generate an epic war poster. Prominently feature the three characters from image 1 (Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, and Ron Weasley) in the foreground, depicted in dynamic, action-ready poses as if engaged in battle, reflecting their determined expressions and magical stances from image 1. In the background, distinctly place the ornate Persian garden hall from image 2 as a grand backdrop to the scene. The poster must include the title 'Battle of Eram Garden' clearly visible at the top.
objects: Harry Potter (in foreground, dynamic pose, determined expression)
Hermione Granger (in foreground, dynamic pose, determined expression)
Ron Weasley (in foreground, dynamic pose, determined expression)
Title 'Battle of Eram Garden' (at the top)
